summary: This bundle records deterministic proof that scenario proposal evidence preserves portable source provenance without requiring host-specific storage fields.

evidenceScope.targetSurface: scenario proposal input and output evidence schema
evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only the portable provenance shape for scenario proposal evidence is marked satisfied. This does not prove proposal mining quality, host log ingestion, or every future source kind.
notClaimed: Host repos can ingest every raw storage layout without adapters
Scenario proposals are semantically good for every source packet
The bundled skill always selects the best scenario proposal workflow

protectedBehaviors: scenario proposal input and output schemas accept generated fixtures
evidence sourceKind is bounded to portable source ports
evidence schema requires only sourceKind, title, and observedAt as portable provenance fields
host-specific path and storage fields are not required by the evidence schema
generated proposal packets preserve evidence while ranking and merging candidates

observed.note: Full repo verification passed after the scenario proposal evidence schema and test changes.
